title: Reported speech: dice que
subtitle: Report what someone says.
overview: Use dice que to report a current statement.
Use dijo que to report a past statement.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: He/she says that he/she is busy.
He/she said that he/she did not have time.
Me dijo que iba a llegar tarde.
He/she told me that he/she was going to arrive late.

items.es: Ana dice que está en camino.
items.en: Ana says she is on the way.

items.es: Mi profesor dijo que la clase empezaba a las nueve.
items.en: My teacher said that the class started at nine.

items.es: El médico me dijo que debía descansar.
items.en: The doctor told me that I should rest.

items.es: Luis dice que no puede venir hoy.
items.en: Luis says he cannot come today.

items.es: Me dijeron que el tren salía tarde.
items.en: They told me that the train was leaving late.
